untranslatable_reason: Broadening Top pattern requires detection of two diverging trend lines (upward top line, downward bottom line) with multiple intersections forming higher highs and lower lows. Available indicators lack slope/linear regression capabilities to track dual trend line formations over extended periods. Pattern detection requires geometric/structural analysis beyond point-in-time indicator values. Substituted with: breakout below Donchian lower band + lower highs/lows + volume confirmation as proxy for pattern completion and downside breakout.
